title: Records
doc_html:
§218. Records

           The secretary of state shall keep for public examination a record of all marks registered or renewed under this Subpart.

           Acts 1954, No. 235, §2. Amended by Acts 1968, No. 475, §1.
doc_text:
§218.  Records
The secretary of state shall keep for public examination a record of all
marks registered or renewed under this Subpart.
Acts 1954, No. 235, §2.  Amended by Acts 1968, No. 475, §1.
